[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up cropped view of large black text on a white background.

The main visual focus is the text, arranged in three lines on the left side reading “kita”, “friends”, and “apa” above “pacaran”.

The setting appears to be a plain white background with no other visible elements, and the text fills most of the frame; lighting and weather are not applicable.

The composition places “kita” and “friends” on the left with “apa” and “pacaran” below, while a separate partial word appears on the right side reading “just”.

Visible Text:
kita
friends
apa
pacaran
just

Practical Summary:
It is an image of large, cropped typography on a white background. The visible text includes “kita friends apa pacaran” and a partial “just” on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

kita friends just apa pacaran

# Structured Version

- kita  
- friends  
- just  
- apa  
- pacaran  

# Notes

The screenshot contains the words shown above; spacing/line breaks may indicate they are separate phrases, but no additional text or context is visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar ini menampilkan teks dalam bahasa Indonesia dan Inggris. Teks tersebut tertulis: "kita just friends apa pacaran". Teks ini secara harfiah berarti "kita hanya teman atau pacaran". Tidak ada konten NSFW, pornografi, atau ketelanjangan dalam gambar ini.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
